title: centaurea johnseniana
intro: Centaurea johnseniana, also known as mountain centaury, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Centaurea johnseniana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various ailments, such as coughs, colds, and digestive problems.
